channel.title: LuxeMia - Indian Ethnic Wear
channel.description: Shop quality Indian ethnic wear - bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, sherwanis, anarkali suits, and jewelry at LuxeMia. Flat rate shipping $14.95 per item, free on orders over $300.

item.g:title: Ethereal Pastel Pink Bridal Lehenga
item.g:description: Step into your fairy tale in this breathtaking pastel pink bridal design made with Pure Net fabric showcasing extraordinary heavy work embroidery. Fabric: Pure Net. Work: Heavy Embroidery. Color: Pastel Pink. Available in sizes S, M, L, XL, XXL. Custom tailoring available on request. Care: Dry clean only. Shipping: Flat rate $14.95 per item worldwide. Free shipping on orders over $300. Dispatch: 3-5 business days (readymade), 5-7 business days (custom). Delivery: 3-5 business days via DHL Express, 7-10 business days via USPS/UPS.
